title: Vistra Corp. (VST) Could Be a Great Choice

title: Why You Should Add Vistra (VST) Stock to Your Portfolio Now

title: Vistra to Report Third Quarter 2022 Results on Nov. 4, 2022
text: IRVING, Texas , Oct. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Vistra (NYSE: VST) plans to report its third quarter 2022 financial and operating results on Friday, Nov. 4, 2022. Management will present the materials during a live conference call and webcast beginning at 9 a.m.

title: Vistra Corp. Squeezed By External Events
text: Vistra is a $9.1 billion market cap independent power producer generating and selling electricity in Texas and other areas of the country. Over 60% of its generation is natural-gas fueled. Higher gas costs now and no reliability incentives compounding Winter Storm Uri's cost hangover may not be offset by market growth, additional (cheaper) US gas supply next year, and hedging.
